message:
feat(opentui): add PTY test infrastructure and sequence analysis module

PTY Test Improvements:
- Add async_stdin module import to demo_showcase for proper stdin handling
- Export new analysis module from tests/common for test failure diagnosis
- Enhance PTY test utilities with improved error handling

Sequence Analysis Module (tests/common/analysis.rs):
- Add comprehensive ANSI sequence analysis for E2E test debugging
- Implement SequenceReport for detecting and inventorying ANSI sequences
- Support sequence kinds: alt screen enter/leave, cursor hide/show,
  cursor position, mouse button enable/disable, mouse motion enable/disable
- Add timeline view showing sequences in order with byte offsets
- Implement paired validation to ensure enter/leave, hide/show pairs match
- Add missing sequence detection for expected but not found sequences
- Add unexpected sequence detection for found but not expected sequences
- Support both human-readable text and JSON output formats for CI integration
- Include serde serialization with SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE for SequenceKind

This infrastructure enables detailed diagnosis of terminal rendering issues
in E2E tests by providing visibility into the exact ANSI sequences being
produced and whether they follow proper pairing conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
